query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN uplineAgentId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_upline,
  SUM(CASE WHEN uplineAgentId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_upline
FROM agents
WHERE isActive = 1;

  SUM(CASE WHEN uplineAgentId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_upline
